steps.title: Map the three moves
steps.content: The text first introduces a team's model for predicting neighborhood business mixes. It then explains part of the method, a clustering algorithm for identifying neighborhoods, and ends by suggesting a possible use for the model.

steps.title: Match the structure
steps.content: Choice A wrongly focuses on predicting business success and other fields. Choice B invents urban planners' motivations and a key finding. Choice C describes trends and a problem the text does not develop. The remaining choice matches the study, methodology, and application sequence. The answer is D.
